channel.title: Dns on Whatever blog
channel.description: Recent content in Dns on Whatever blog

item.title: cloudflare ddns的routeros脚本
item.description: Insert Lead paragraph here. 在参考了j大佬的博客(https://www.digs.eu.org/2024/01/04/ROS%20cloudflare%20DDNS%E7%9B%B8%E5%85%B3%E8%84%9A%E6%9C%AC/)和这位作者(https://gist.githubusercontent.com/kolobus/18680f8fb01ce3003cb9a3f82c9d30e1/raw/cf8ecd84fc0e5dccb7298422c7d8c40410c345a3/cf-ddns.rsc)的脚本后, 魔改的. 适用在cloudflare上更新ipv4和ipv6的动态ip; 和原作者不同的是, 我的脚本是直接从ros接口上取相应ip, 其实我这脚本是放在ppp profile-on up-script中, 在拨号完成后执行一次, 而不是定时反复执行, 故相应修改了代码. token, zone_id, record_id等请先行获取, 获取方法在前述j大佬博客中有所提及. 1# Cloudflare Dynamic DNS update script 2# Required policy: read, write, test, policy 3# Add this script to scheduler 4# Install DigiCert root CA or disable check-certificate 5# Modified from https://gist.github.com/kolobus/18680f8fb01ce3003cb9a3f82c9d30e1 6# Configuration --------------------------------------------------------------------- 7 8:local TOKEN "" 9 10:local ZONEIDv6 "" 11:local RECORDIDv6 "" 12:local RECORDNAMEv6 "" 13:local IP6NEW 14 15:local ZONEIDv4 "" 16:local RECORDIDv4 "" 17:local RECORDNAMEv4 "" 18:local IP4NEW 19 20:local WANIF "" 21 22#------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 23 24 25 26 27:if ([/interface get $WANIF value-name=running]) do={ 28 29 # IPv6 check 30 31 :local "IP6NEW" [/ipv6/address get [:pick [find dynamic global interface=$WANIF] 0 ] address] 32 :set "IP6NEW" [:pick $"IP6NEW" 0 [:find $"IP6NEW" "/"]] 33 34 :local url "https://api.

item.title: debian LXC搭建modsns
item.description: 修改于6/5/2023 搭建环境: PVE LXC debian 11, 网关clash(科学环境) 项目地址: https://github.com/IrineSistiana/mosdns 下载并copy 二进制文件mosdns到 /usr/bin/ 新建目录: /etc/mosdns, 下载并copy一众规则文件到该目录, 配置文件config.yaml也放这里 关闭systemd-resolved 1systemctl disable systemd-resolved 新建/etc/systemd/system/mosdns.service 1# /etc/systemd/system/mosdns.service 2[Unit] 3Description=A DNS forwarder 4ConditionFileIsExecutable=/usr/bin/mosdns 5 6[Service] 7User=root 8StartLimitInterval=5 9StartLimitBurst=10 10ExecStart=/usr/bin/mosdns "start" "-c" "/etc/mosdns/config.yaml" "-d" "/etc/mosdns" 11Restart=always 12RestartSec=120 13EnvironmentFile=-/etc/sysconfig/mosdns 14 15[Install] 16WantedBy=multi-user.target 开机自启/启动运行 1systemctl enable mosdns 2systemctl start mosdns 我个人的配置文件如下(v5), (不使用fallback, 仅以direct文件分流): 1## mosdns v5 conf 2 3 4log: 5 level: debug 6 # file: "/etc/mosdns/logs/mosdns.log" 7 # production: false 8 9 10plugins: 11 - tag: cache 12 type: cache 13 args: 14 size: 409600 15 lazy_cache_ttl: 259200 16 dump_file: .

item.title: Ros通过dhcp6下发ipv6 dns的设定
item.description: 修改于6/5/2023 1/ipv6 dhcp-server option 2 add code=23 name=dns value=0xfd80000000000000ccf2bbfffe0abcf1 此外, ros的ipv6-ND中不勾选advertise dns, 勾选other config.
